'''âg-sh-j''' ('''kagashaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vagulate|vagulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vagulate|vagulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-sh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kagashaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigashaj|thigashaj]] || [[word:jigashaj|jigashaj]] || [[word:shigashaj|shigashaj]] || [[word:kigashaj|kigashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugashaj|thuthugashaj]] || [[word:jujugashaj|jujugashaj]] || [[word:shushugashaj|shushugashaj]] || [[word:kukugashaj|kukugashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugashaj|thugashaj]] || [[word:jugashaj|jugashaj]] || [[word:shugashaj|shugashaj]] || [[word:kugashaj|kugashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugashaj|thugashaj]] || [[word:jugashaj|jugashaj]] || [[word:shugashaj|shugashaj]] || [[word:kugashaj|kugashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegashaj|thegashaj]] || [[word:jegashaj|jegashaj]] || [[word:shegashaj|shegashaj]] || [[word:kegashaj|kegashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogashaj|thothogashaj]] || [[word:jojogashaj|jojogashaj]] || [[word:shoshogashaj|shoshogashaj]] || [[word:kokogashaj|kokogashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogashaj|thogashaj]] || [[word:jogashaj|jogashaj]] || [[word:shogashaj|shogashaj]] || [[word:kogashaj|kogashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogashaj|thogashaj]] || [[word:jogashaj|jogashaj]] || [[word:shogashaj|shogashaj]] || [[word:kogashaj|kogashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgashaj|thĂŠgashaj]] || [[word:jĂŠgashaj|jĂŠgashaj]] || [[word:shĂŠgashaj|shĂŠgashaj]] || [[word:kĂŠgashaj|kĂŠgashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagashaj|thathagashaj]] || [[word:jajagashaj|jajagashaj]] || [[word:shashagashaj|shashagashaj]] || [[word:kakagashaj|kakagashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagashaj|thagashaj]] || [[word:jagashaj|jagashaj]] || [[word:shagashaj|shagashaj]] || [[word:kagashaj|kagashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagashaj|thagashaj]] || [[word:jagashaj|jagashaj]] || [[word:shagashaj|shagashaj]] || [[word:kagashaj|kagashaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagashaj|shagashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagashaj|goshagashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagashaj|gokishagashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagashajnĂŒ|shagashajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagashajnknĂŒ|goshagashajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashajnĂŒ|gokishagashajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagashajshĂ«|shagashajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagashajnkshĂ«|goshagashajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagashajshĂ«|gokishagashajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashajro|shagashajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashajnkro|goshagashajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashajro|gokishagashajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashajmu|shagashajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashajnkmu|goshagashajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashajmu|gokishagashajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagashajsher|shagashajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagashajnksher|goshagashajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagashajsher|gokishagashajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagashajng|shagashajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagashajnkng|goshagashajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagashajng|gokishagashajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagashajya|shagashajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagashajnkya|goshagashajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagashajya|gokishagashajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagashajyam|shagashajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagashajnkyam|goshagashajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagashajyam|gokishagashajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashajnĂŒshĂ«|shagashajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagashajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagashajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashajnĂŒro|shagashajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashajnknĂŒro|goshagashajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashajnĂŒro|gokishagashajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashajnĂŒmu|shagashajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashajnknĂŒmu|goshagashajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashajnĂŒmu|gokishagashajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashajshĂ«nĂŒ|shagashajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagashajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagashajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashajshĂ«ro|shagashajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashajnkshĂ«ro|goshagashajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashajshĂ«ro|gokishagashajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashajshĂ«mu|shagashajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashajnkshĂ«mu|goshagashajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashajshĂ«mu|gokishagashajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashajronĂŒ|shagashajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashajnkronĂŒ|goshagashajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashajronĂŒ|gokishagashajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashajroshĂ«|shagashajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashajnkroshĂ«|goshagashajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashajroshĂ«|gokishagashajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashajromu|shagashajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashajnkromu|goshagashajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashajromu|gokishagashajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashajmunĂŒ|shagashajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashajnkmunĂŒ|goshagashajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashajmunĂŒ|gokishagashajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashajmushĂ«|shagashajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashajnkmushĂ«|goshagashajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashajmushĂ«|gokishagashajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashajmuro|shagashajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashajnkmuro|goshagashajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashajmuro|gokishagashajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
